## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest`; `make run-tests` if the C core changed)
- [ ] New/changed public APIs have docstrings
- [ ] `import neucode` still works without optional extras (`rl`, `nir`, `akida`)
- [ ] Source files are ASCII-only (no Unicode arrows/degree signs/em-dashes)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or the public API changed
